steps.title: Enter the two points
steps.content: The line contains $(0,0)$ and $(1,40)$. These two points determine the slope and intercept.

steps.title: Read the model
steps.content: The slope is $\dfrac{40-0}{1-0}=40$, and the intercept is $0$ because the line passes through the origin. Therefore $$h(x)=40x.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Choices A, B, and C all give $h(0)=40$, so they fail the point $(0,0)$.
